problem_reduced: The prior blocker mixed operational scripts with tests, receipts, evidence artifacts, fixtures, and historical plans. That made the rollback gap look larger but less actionable.
repair: The inventory now scans tracked operational shell surfaces only: .flywheel/scripts, .flywheel/hooks, .flywheel/lib, and top-level scripts. Non-operational prefixes are explicitly excluded and reported.

status_decision.reason: Safe local work exists: one operational surface at a time can be patched and proven. The parent should not sit in blocked state waiting for a perfect fleet-wide rewrite.

validation.summary: warn because operational rollback adoption is incomplete; no false complete claim

next_work_policy: Create or claim bounded child beads for specific high-risk operational scripts; close only when the inventory count decreases and the script has a failure-path regression.
